mnemonics.title: BFS Queue
mnemonics.content: Breadth First Search: Be Fast, Sweep levels using Queue

mnemonics.title: DFS Stack
mnemonics.content: Depth First Search: Dig Fast using Stack

visualTips.visualization: Imagine chessboard with dots marking connections
Compare spiderweb (sparse) vs. fully connected mesh

analogies.analogy: Like academic citations - more references from important papers increase rank
Exploring city - BFS visits all neighbors first, DFS goes deep into streets
